name: SilentFailureDetector Agent Policy
description: Binary classifier agent that detects silent AI failures — responses that are confidently wrong.

0.label: trust
0.meaning: The response is safe or correct. No action required.

1.label: flag_risky
1.meaning: The response is a suspected silent failure — confidently wrong. Flag for review.

wrong_confident.description: Factually wrong AND stated with high confidence — silent failure.

llm.description: Queries an LLM API (OpenAI/HuggingFace/Ollama-compatible) with a balanced system prompt.

heuristic.description: Deterministic rule-based agent using confidence/hedging markers + number density.

task_levels.easy: Obvious certainty terms, clear hallucinations, minimal ambiguity.
task_levels.medium: Subtle markers, some edge cases, requires contextual reasoning.
task_levels.hard: Adversarial phrasing, domain jargon, low lexical cues — semantic understanding required.
